input.copy: Tired of swiping on apps that just don't get your background? Meet other Black professionals near you.

expected.notes: Implies the viewer's race via 'your background' and 'other Black professionals' (the 'other' construction that 2.1 turns on).

input.copy: Proud of where your family comes from? Connect with fellow Latino singles tonight.

expected.notes: Asserts the viewer shares the Latino attribute via 'your family' and 'fellow Latino singles'.

input.copy: Looking for a church home this Sunday? We think you'll fit right in.

expected.notes: Implies the viewer's religion (phase-4 spec example). Contrast the compliant 'Date Christian singles!'.

input.copy: Feeling distant from your faith lately? Our fellowship would love to welcome you back.

expected.notes: 'your faith' asserts the viewer holds a religious belief.

input.copy: Turning 50 this year? This joint formula was built for a body like yours.

expected.notes: Implies the viewer's age. Contrast compliant product description 'Our new lotion and creams fight wrinkles'.

input.copy: Catching more gray hairs and fine lines than you'd like? Time to turn back the clock.

expected.notes: Targets the viewer's aging/appearance directly rather than describing a product.

input.copy: Over 65 and worn out by confusing Medicare mailers? This plan was made for you.

expected.notes: Implies the viewer's age ('Over 65 ... made for you').

input.copy: Want to meet someone who just gets you? Thousands of other gay men are waiting nearby.

expected.notes: 'other gay men' asserts the viewer's sexual orientation.

input.copy: New in town and hoping to meet other lesbians who share your vibe?

expected.notes: 'other lesbians' + 'your' implies the viewer's orientation.

input.copy: Still working out who you really are? Our circle for trans folks will meet you where you're at.

expected.notes: Implies the viewer is questioning gender identity / is trans.

input.copy: Meet other trans women who have walked the road you're walking.

expected.notes: 'other trans women' asserts the viewer's gender identity.

input.copy: Fighting to keep your blood sugar under control every day? We can lighten the load.

expected.notes: Implies the viewer has diabetes. Contrast compliant 'New diabetes treatment available'.

input.copy: Can't remember the last time you felt like yourself? You don't have to sit with depression alone.

expected.notes: Implies the viewer's depression. Contrast compliant 'Depression counseling'.

input.copy: Has a doctor ever told you that you're prediabetic? Our coaching keeps you ahead of it.

expected.notes: Asserts a health condition about the viewer.

input.copy: Drowning in credit card bills? We can help you start over.

expected.notes: Implies the viewer's vulnerable financial status (phase-4 spec example). Contrast compliant 'Services to clean up any previous offenses'.

input.copy: Dodging calls from collectors and losing sleep over what you owe? There's a way out.

expected.notes: Asserts the viewer is in debt / financial distress.

input.copy: Does one old mistake keep tanking your background checks? Let's get your record cleared.

expected.notes: Implies the viewer has a criminal record. Contrast compliant 'Services to clean up any previous offenses'.

input.copy: Ready to put your conviction behind you and get hired again?

expected.notes: 'your conviction' asserts a criminal record.

input.copy: Sarah, your custom name necklace is ready — claim it today.

expected.notes: Uses the viewer's name to imply personal identification.

input.copy: Punch in your Social Security number to find out instantly if you qualify.

expected.notes: Solicits private PII. 2.1 (asks for personal info) and financial-services:1.1 (directly requests PII) both govern; citing either counts.

input.copy: Fed up with the way your shop steward keeps selling you out? Switch to a union that fights.

expected.notes: Implies the viewer's trade union membership.

input.copy: Heads up: our records show your mail-in ballot still hasn't reached us. Act before it's too late.

expected.notes: Implies the viewer's voting status. Contrast compliant 'Learn about voter registration'.

input.copy: A dating community built for Black singles.

expected.notes: Hard negative: describes the audience without attributing the trait to the viewer. Compliant analog of 'Find black singles today.'

input.copy: Meet Latino professionals growing their careers.

expected.notes: Hard negative: 'Meet Latino professionals' describes who the service is for (compliant), unlike 'Meet other Latino...'.

input.copy: Faith-based matchmaking for Christian singles.

expected.notes: Hard negative: describes the service/audience. Compliant analog of 'Date Christian singles!'

expected.notes: Hard negative: describes an event, does not assert the viewer's religion.

input.copy: Our new serum visibly smooths fine lines and deep wrinkles.

expected.notes: Hard negative: describes the product, not the viewer. Compliant analog of 'Our new lotion and creams fight wrinkles'.

input.copy: Coding bootcamps open to learners of every age.

expected.notes: Hard negative: general availability. Compliant analog of 'Age is just a number...'.

input.copy: Small-group Mediterranean tours for gay travelers.

expected.notes: Hard negative: describes the audience. Compliant analog of 'Atlantis Gay Cruises'.

input.copy: An online book club for lesbian readers.

expected.notes: Hard negative: describes the audience without viewer attribution.

input.copy: Trans folks and allies: come to our first-Friday social.

expected.notes: Hard negative: describes a community event. Compliant analog of the trans meetup example (reworded to avoid shared wording).

input.copy: Now enrolling: a structured diabetes management program.

expected.notes: Hard negative: describes the service. Compliant analog of 'New diabetes treatment available'.

input.copy: Licensed therapists offering depression counseling and support.

expected.notes: Hard negative: describes the service. Compliant analog of 'Depression counseling'.

input.copy: Fitness coaching and meal plans for a healthier lifestyle.

expected.notes: Hard negative: general wellbeing, no personal attribute asserted.

input.copy: A plain-English guide to how debt consolidation works.

expected.notes: Hard negative: educational, describes a service without attributing debt to the viewer.

expected.notes: Hard negative: describes a comparison tool, no personal attribute.

expected.notes: Hard negative: describes the product. Compliant analog of 'We print customizable t-shirts and stickers with your name.'

expected.notes: Hard negative: informational. Compliant analog of 'Learn about voter registration'.

input.copy: Join our union and get a seat at the table.
